title: Kaido Falls From the Sky — Part 3
description: Kaido’s terrifying introduction widens the world beyond Dressrosa.
scene: On pages 11–15, King Riku, Marines, Luffy, Trafalgar Law, Rebecca deal with the aftermath of Dressrosa, with the Marines, allies, and citizens responding to the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It appears something fell from the sky!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Who in the hell did what to who!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The strong live... the weak die...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: That is simply... the way of this world

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: As I recall, wasn't there a legend around here about a "sky Island"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: ...that might or might not have monsters living on it!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: So, it fell down from a "sky Island"!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Captain!! The impact capsized one of our ships ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: A few minutes earlier: the ruins of the sky island "Ballon terminal"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: You do know that we're 10,000 metres up, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: was looking for a place to die

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: were his tale to be told...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: If you are serious, I shall not stop you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: As a pirate... he had suffered defeat seven times

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: by both marines and enemies, he had been captured 18 times...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: tortured and tortured again, he lived on as a prisoner...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: An almost unheard of suicide by jumping from a sky island...

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: To repeat, he single- handedly challenged the Marines & yonkou, was captured 18 times, and tortured over a thousand times

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: He was sentenced to death 40 times...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: when they hanged him, the chains broke...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: when they sent him to the guillotine, the blade shattered...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: even when they impaled him, the Spears broke...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Ultimately, he has sunk nine great prison ships....!!

summary: This part follows the consequences of Dressrosa’s liberation and shows how the victory changes the country and the wider world.
